data.current_role_summary: Aspiring Backend and AI developer specializing in building scalable web architectures and intelligent systems using Python, Django, and deep learning frameworks.
role_summary_bullets: Core Identity & Mission: Dedicated to bridging the gap between robust backend engineering and practical, scalable AI/ML application development.
Domain Mastery: Proven proficiency in Django, REST API architecture, and AI/ML model integration including RAG pipelines and YOLOv8 computer vision.
Quantifiable Impact: Engineered an automated ticket management system (Track-IT) with JWT-based security and an ANPR detection system utilizing YOLOv8 for automated process execution.
Strategic Scope: Focuses on full-stack development, moving from backend service design to implementing end-user facing recommendation engines and web interfaces.
Leadership Philosophy: Operates as a builder-centric developer, prioritizing system security, authentication, and user-interactive intelligent modules.
Current Momentum: Currently scaling industry-relevant experience as an Intern at ICRISAT while maintaining a technical foundation in Python, Java, and cloud-integrated frameworks.

career_timeline.title: Intern
career_timeline.one_line_impact: Contributing to technical development efforts leveraging Python and Django frameworks.

data.data_confidence_rationale: Data is sourced directly from the subject's LinkedIn profile, providing verifiable career, education, and technical project information.
